\tzpentry{ID3657}{Quantum Mode Frequency Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3657 introduces Quantum Mode Frequency Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} v_{\text{GW}}(\omega) = c\left[1 - \frac{\hbar\omega}{m_{\text{Planck}}c^2} \times \ln\left(\frac{\omega}{\omega_{\text{cutoff}}}\right)\right] \end{equation}
